detection.git_hooks: scripts/install-hooks.sh via cd mobile && mise run setup_hooks

choices.coverage_policy: Use .claude/rules/testing.md and package-specific workflow min_coverage gates. No root .coverage-thresholds.json is configured for this repo.

divine_context.purpose: Optional cross-repo product, architecture, Nostr, terminology, and service catalog context for broad divine-* tasks.

divine_brain.purpose: Major company knowledge store for Slack, Drive, GitHub, Gmail, Figma, Cloudflare, Fastly, incidents, customer themes, and prior decisions not visible in the local checkout.
divine_brain.auth_policy: Do not commit CF Access headers or service tokens. Configure Divine Brain MCP credentials in developer-local/global MCP config.
